CREATE TABLE Demo.Demo.Example_Countries (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name STRING, geometry GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Example_Countries (id, name, geometry) VALUES (1, 'Country A', ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 0 10, 10 10, 10 0, 0 0))', 4326));
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Example_Countries (id, name, geometry) VALUES (2, 'Country B', ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((20 20, 20 30, 30 30, 30 20, 20 20))', 4326));
CREATE TABLE Demo.Demo.Example_Polygons (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, poly GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Example_Polygons (id, poly) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 0 5, 5 5, 5 0, 0 0))', 4326));
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Example_Polygons (id, poly) VALUES (2, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((10 10, 10 15, 15 15, 15 10, 10 10))', 4326));
CREATE TABLE Demo.Demo.Multi_Countries (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, geometry GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO Demo.Demo.Multi_Countries (id, geometry) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('MULTIPOLYGON(((0 0, 0 10, 10 10, 10 0, 0 0)), ((20 20, 20 30, 30 30, 30 20, 20 20)))', 4326));
